vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I spent most of my weekends taking apart old gadgets to see how they worked.

vocab.meaning: thời đại trước khi đồ điện tử phổ biến
vocab.example: Growing up in a preelectronic era, my primary sources of entertainment were physical games and storytelling.

vocab.meaning: hòa mình/giao hòa với thiên nhiên
vocab.example: I loved to head to the local woodlands to commune with nature, identifying different birds and plants.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi cá nhân/độc hành
vocab.example: Drawing was a solitary pursuit that allowed me to retreat into my own world for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự điêu luyện về thể chất
vocab.example: Playing football every afternoon was a great way for us to test our physical prowess against each other.

vocab.meaning: học tập thông qua vận động/xúc giác
vocab.example: I engaged in a lot of kinesthetic learning by building intricate treehouses with my older siblings.

vocab.meaning: thú vui/trò tiêu khiển đáng trân trọng
vocab.example: Collecting rare stamps was a cherished pastime that I shared with my grandfather during my primary school years.

vocab.meaning: tìm kiếm/lục lọi (đồ vật, vật liệu)
vocab.example: We used to scavenge for scrap metal and wood to construct makeshift go-karts.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi đóng vai đầy sáng tạo
vocab.example: Imaginative role-play was a staple of our childhood, where we would pretend to be explorers in uncharted lands.

vocab.meaning: quyền tiếp cận tự do/không bị hạn chế
vocab.example: Having unfettered access to a massive library sparked my lifelong passion for historical biographies.
